name: King's Sarcophagus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>棺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひつぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: "Horus" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by card effects that do not target them. You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY; send 1 "Horus" monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "King's Sarcophagus" up to four times per turn. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if your "Horus" monster battles an opponent's monster: You can send that opponent's monster to the GY.
eff: "Horus" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by card effects that do not target them. You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY; send 1 "Horus" monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "King's Sarcophagus" up to four times per turn. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if your "Horus" monster battles an opponent's monster: You can send that opponent's monster to the GY.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
